description: Express.js app with Knex.js and PostgreSQL. Scaffolded from Cursor's Auto MAX mode.

vulnerabilities.description: X-Powered-By header exposes information about the used framework to potential attackers
Unsanitized input from an HTTP parameter flows into raw, where it is used in an SQL query. This may result in an SQL Injection vulnerability.
